title: Rebind v0.5.39 release metadata after process correction
rawUserRequest: 再来尝试发版本。继续推进 v0.5.39 发布，但必须先完成 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程；遇到流程问题先修正根因，不绕过门禁。
outOfScope: Creating or pushing tag v0.5.39 from this Work Item
Creating or editing a GitHub Release
Changing the release workflow, release gates, or archive policy
Changing adopter installation behavior or provider assets

sources.reason: Defines the bounded v0.5.39 metadata preparation and exact release evidence contract.
Published release metadata is the v0.5.39 identity authority.
Canonical release state currently exposes the stale candidate identity to be corrected.
Supported command for generating freeze and digest evidence after archival.
Release preflight is the acceptance gate for candidate metadata.
Defines template release identity and protected publication boundaries.
Defines Contract, archive, premerge finalization, PR, merge, and closure order.

riskAssessment.reason: Only candidate metadata is rebound; tag and provider publication remain outside this Work Item.

executionDecision.reason: Candidate metadata identity and verification are explicitly bounded.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: All four release metadata files identify v0.5.39 consistently and use one exact source/tag/metadata identity.
Release freeze and digest evidence are finalized with the premerge finalizer after this Work Item is archived.
The repository release preflight, state consistency, lockfile, supply-chain, and full AI/project checks pass.
No tag, GitHub Release, adopter change, workflow change, or archived evidence rewrite is included.
guidelines: Release metadata changes must remain within this Contract scope.
Use repository finalizer commands for generated release evidence; do not hand-edit generated freeze or digest fields.
Preserve the template/adopter boundary and do not publish from a Work Item branch.

intent.problem: The repository has a v0.5.39 candidate with stale and inconsistent release identity after earlier stopped release attempts; publication cannot proceed until metadata is rebound to the corrected source-tree boundary.
constraints: The process correction PR must already be merged and the default branch synchronized.
This Work Item prepares metadata only; publication occurs later through the protected release workflow.
The active Work Item must be archived before premerge freeze finalization, and active/archive evidence must remain export-ignored.
intent.rationale: A separate, bounded metadata Work Item provides an auditable release candidate while keeping process correction and external publication distinct.

declaredIntent.summary: Prepare an auditable v0.5.39 candidate whose metadata and freeze evidence share one exact source identity.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: candidate metadata points to one exact v0.5.39 source identity
archival does not change the frozen source tree
provider publication is not performed by candidate preparation
scenarioCoverage.reason: Provider publication is explicitly reserved for the protected release workflow.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized another complete attempt to publish v0.5.39 after process corrections.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
